scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix shell && npm install --prefix mfe-react && npm install --prefix mfe-vue && npm install --prefix mfe-svelte && npm install --prefix mfe-vanilla-angular
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm start --prefix mfe-react" "npm start --prefix mfe-vue" "npm start --prefix mfe-svelte" "npm start --prefix mfe-vanilla-angular" "npm start --prefix shell"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix mfe-react && npm run build --prefix mfe-vue && npm run build --prefix mfe-svelte && npm run build --prefix mfe-vanilla-angular && npm run build --prefix shell
